# Build AI Infrastructure Your Way, Anywhere | Mirantis
The simple and frictionless way to manage AI workload clusters across clouds, on-prem, hybrid and edge.

## General Information
- [Learn More](https://www.mirantis.com/blog/mirantis-k0rdent-nvidia-bluefield-a-practical-blueprint-for-building-next-gen-ai-infrastructure/): Discover more about Mirantis and its offerings.
- [Contact Us](https://www.mirantis.com/contact/): Get in touch with Mirantis for inquiries or support.
- [Docs](https://docs.mirantis.com/welcome/): Access comprehensive documentation for all Mirantis products.
- [Store](https://store.mirantis.com/): Explore the Mirantis store for products and services.
- [Partners](https://www.mirantis.com/partners/): Learn about Mirantis partnerships and collaborations.
- [Training](https://training.mirantis.com/): Find training resources and programs offered by Mirantis.
- [Public Sector](https://www.mirantis.com/public-sector-solutions/): Information on Mirantis solutions tailored for the public sector.

## Product Offerings
### Mirantis k0rdent
- [Why k0rdent?](https://www.mirantis.com/why-k0rdent/): Understand the benefits and features of the k0rdent platform.
- [Mirantis k0rdent AI](https://www.mirantis.com/software/mirantis-k0rdent-ai/): Explore AI application and platform management at scale with k0rdent.
- [Mirantis k0rdent Enterprise](https://www.mirantis.com/software/mirantis-k0rdent-enterprise/): Manage AI, container, and VM workloads at fleet scale using k0rdent.

### Container Management Solutions
- [Mirantis Kubernetes Engine (MKE)](https://www.mirantis.com/software/mirantis-kubernetes-engine/): An enterprise container platform for managing Kubernetes workloads.
- [Mirantis OpenStack for Kubernetes (MOSK)](https://www.mirantis.com/software/mirantis-openstack-for-kubernetes/): A private cloud platform that integrates OpenStack with Kubernetes.
- [Mirantis Container Runtime (MCR)](https://www.mirantis.com/software/mirantis-container-runtime/): Industry-leading runtime for containerized applications.
- [Mirantis Secure Registry (MSR)](https://www.mirantis.com/software/mirantis-secure-registry/): An enterprise container registry for secure image storage.

### Development Tools
- [Lens Desktop](https://k8slens.dev/): The world’s most popular Kubernetes IDE for developers.
- [k0rdent](https://k0rdent.io/): Open source distributed container management solution.
- [k0smotron](https://k0smotron.io/): Kubernetes control plane manager for enhanced orchestration.
- [k0s](https://www.mirantis.com/software/k0s/): A frictionless Kubernetes experience for developers.

## Infrastructure Solutions
- [AI/ML Infrastructure Solutions](https://www.mirantis.com/ai-infrastructure-solutions/): Tailored solutions for AI and machine learning workloads.
- [Multi-Cloud & Multi-Cluster Management Solutions](https://www.mirantis.com/multi-cluster-manager/): Manage workloads across multiple clouds and clusters.
- [Private GPU & AI Factory](https://www.mirantis.com/solutions/ai-factory-infrastructure/): Infrastructure solutions for GPU and AI workloads.
- [Sovereign AI Cloud](https://www.mirantis.com/solutions/sovereign-ai-cloud/): A dedicated cloud solution for sovereign AI applications.

## Application Delivery
- [Modern Application Delivery](https://www.mirantis.com/modern-application-development/): Strategies and tools for delivering modern applications.
- [App Modernization](https://www.mirantis.com/application-migration-and-modernization/): Solutions for modernizing legacy applications.
- [Cloud Platform Operations](https://www.mirantis.com/cloud-platform-operations/): Best practices for operating cloud platforms.
- [AI Inferencing Platform](https://www.mirantis.com/ai-inferencing-platform/): Infrastructure for deploying AI inferencing workloads.
- [Workload Migration](https://www.mirantis.com/workload-migration/): Services and tools for migrating workloads to the cloud.

## Support and Resources
- [Enterprise Support](https://www.mirantis.com/support/enterprise-support-options/): Comprehensive support services for enterprise customers.
- [Resource Library](https://www.mirantis.com/resources/): A collection of resources including whitepapers, case studies, and more.
- [Blog](https://www.mirantis.com/blog/): Insights and updates from the Mirantis team.
- [Case Studies](https://www.mirantis.com/cloud-case-studies/): Real-world examples of Mirantis solutions in action.
- [Webinars](https://www.mirantis.com/cloud-webinars/): Educational webinars on various topics related to cloud and AI.
- [Tech Talks](https://www.mirantis.com/labs/): In-depth discussions on technical topics and innovations.
- [Cloud Native Cookbook](https://www.mirantis.com/cloud-native-cookbook/): A guide to cloud-native application development.

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.mirantis.com/company/privacy-policy/): Review Mirantis' privacy practices.

## Partner Solutions
- [amazee.io](https://www.mirantis.com/software/lagoon/): Application delivery and hosting platform.
- [OpenShift vs Rancher vs Mirantis](https://www.mirantis.com/openshift-vs-rancher-vs-mirantis/): A comparative analysis of container management platforms.
- [Mirantis Training Credentials](https://certification.mirantis.com/): Information on training credentials and certifications.
- [Mirantis Logos and Usage Guidelines](https://www.mirantis.com/logo/mirantis/): Guidelines for using Mirantis branding.
